validated_data.description: The Pradhan Mantri Awas Yojana (Urban) is a government initiative to provide affordable housing to the urban poor. The scheme aims to provide a pucca house to eligible beneficiaries, with a focus on Economically Weaker Sections (EWS) and Low-Income Groups (LIG).
validated_data.benefit: ₹1.5 lakh for BLC, ₹1 lakh for ISSR
validated_data.application_process: Beneficiaries can apply through the PMAY-U website or through State/UT governments. The application process involves submitting required documents and meeting eligibility criteria.
